parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT client_id, slug, currency, timezone, country
FROM `oneeighty-warehouse.ref.clients`
WHERE status='active' AND has_meta=TRUE

SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d',
    COALESCE(
      DATE_SUB(MAX(date_start), INTERVAL 3 DAY),
      DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 24 MONTH)
    )
  ) AS since_date,
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', CURRENT_DATE()) AS until_date
FROM `oneeighty-warehouse.raw.raw_meta_campaign_insights`
WHERE client_id = '{{ $json.client_id }}'
  AND date_start >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 24 MONTH)

SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d',
    COALESCE(
      DATE_SUB(MAX(date_start), INTERVAL 3 DAY),
      DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 24 MONTH)
    )
  ) AS since_date,
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', CURRENT_DATE()) AS until_date
FROM `oneeighty-warehouse.raw.raw_meta_ad_insights`
WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Decode secrets').item.json.client_id }}'
  AND date_start >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 24 MONTH)
